dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeBack: Welcome back! Here's an overview of the markets and your recent activity.
dashboard.quickActionsDesc: Start a new analysis or manage your data
dashboard.backendStatus: Make sure backend is running and seeded

landing.heroSubtitle: Advanced portfolio analysis and simulation tools for modern investors. Visualize risk, calculate efficient frontiers, and predict your future wealth.
landing.efficientFrontierDesc: Optimize your asset allocation using Modern Portfolio Theory to maximize returns for your risk appetite.
landing.monteCarloDesc: Run Monte Carlo simulations to see how your portfolio value evolves over time with regular contributions.
landing.portfolioMgmtDesc: Save and compare different strategies. Track your historical performance and stay on target.

portfolios.title: My Portfolios
portfolios.noPortfolios: No portfolios found. Create one to get started!
portfolios.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
portfolios.atLeastOneAsset: At least one asset is required
portfolios.notFound: Portfolio not found or failed to load.
portfolios.assetMixDesc: Current weight distribution of your portfolio

footer.disclaimerText1: The simulation results provided by this application are estimates based on historical market data and do not guarantee future investment returns or performance. The figures and charts displayed are for informational purposes only and may differ from actual results.
footer.disclaimerText2: Final investment decisions should be made at your own discretion and responsibility. We are not liable for any damages (direct or indirect) resulting from the use of this service. We also do not guarantee the accuracy or timeliness of the data.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your email and password to login
auth.signupSubtitle: Create an account to start simulations
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Please check your inbox.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.signupSuccess: Account created. Please check your email for confirmation.

simulation.efSubtitle: Analyze the risk and return trade-off for your selected portfolio of assets.
simulation.accSubtitle: Estimate the future value of your portfolio based on initial investment and monthly contributions.
simulation.readyDesc: Select a portfolio and enter your investment goals to see how your wealth could grow over time.
simulation.optimizerCalculating: Our optimizer is calculating the best possible allocations for your selected assets.
simulation.selectAssetsInstruction: Select at least two assets from the left panel and click 'Run Simulation' to visualize the optimal risk-return curve.
simulation.allocationSummaryDesc: Key metrics for optimal and selected points
simulation.selectAtLeast2: Select at least 2 assets to begin
simulation.comparePortfoliosDesc: Add your saved portfolios to the chart
simulation.clickChartInstruction: Click chart points to select other portfolios
simulation.projectedDividendDesc: Estimated cash payments you'll receive each year (P50 confidence).
simulation.reinvestmentImpactDesc: Comparing total wealth: Reinvesting vs. Receiving cash.
simulation.dividendSummaryText: By Year {years}, you are projected to receive about ${amount} in dividends annually.
simulation.reinvestmentSummaryText: Reinvesting dividends adds an extra ${amount} to your final portfolio value.
simulation.scenarioDesc: How your current portfolio would have performed during this crisis.
simulation.failedToLoadStress: Failed to load stress test data.

rebalance.title: Rebalancing Advice
rebalance.comparisonDesc: Comparing your current weights to the target allocation.

affiliates.title: Recommended Brokers for Your Portfolio
affiliates.subtitle: Open an account with these brokers to start implementing your investment strategy.
